svg.title: CloudQuery MCP — deploy.sh steps
svg.desc: Five sequential steps run by deploy.sh to provision the full stack

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does deploy.sh do to set up ECR?')
sendPrompt('How does deploy.sh build the Docker image?')
sendPrompt('How does deploy.sh create the IAM execution role?')
sendPrompt('How does deploy.sh register the AgentCore endpoint?')
sendPrompt('What developer config files does deploy.sh write?')

svg.text: aws, docker, python3 on PATH · IAM user needs ecr · iam · bedrock-agentcore permissions
developers need: npm install -g mcp-remote · then copy their config file
